title: Kwara 2027 Guber: Kehinde Bankole Kicks Off Strategic Consultation, Meets Northern Politicians - FinancialEDGE
description: The race for the 2027 governorship election seems to have started earlier than expected in Kwara State, albeit on a very impressive and commendable note, just as the founder Of KAB Constructions Limited and Chairman Of Kehinde Alex Bankole Foundation, Dr. Kehinde Alex Bankole kicked off his strategic consultations with key Northern leaders to deepen
html: The race for the 2027 governorship election seems to have started earlier than expected in Kwara State, albeit on a very impressive and commendable note, just as the founder Of KAB Constructions Limited and Chairman Of Kehinde Alex Bankole Foundation, Dr. Kehinde Alex Bankole kicked off his strategic consultations with key Northern leaders to deepen his aspiration of becoming the next Governor the state.
